title: A verified open-access AI-based chemical microparticle image database for in-situ particle visualization and quantification in multi-phase flow
author: Zhenguo Gao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This report provided a new method and idea for the detection, segmentation, classification, and quantitative analysis of four dispersed phase particles - "DPPs" (agglomeration, bubble, crystal, and droplet) in chemical multi-phase flow processes.
steps_raw: This report provided a new method and idea for the detection, segmentation, classification, and quantitative analysis of four dispersed phase particles - "DPPs" (agglomeration, bubble, crystal, and droplet) in chemical multi-phase flow processes.
